Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.model.words

Class Words

java.lang.Object
com.example.escriturarapida.model.words.Words
All Implemented Interfaces:
IWords
public class Words extends Object implements IWords
Implementation of IWords that manages all words in the game "Escritura RÃ¡pida".

Stores three lists of words classified by difficulty: low, medium and high. Provides methods to generate random words, validate answers, remove used words and select the correct list according to the player's level.

Level distribution

  • Levels 1â€“14 â†’ Hard words (hardLevelWords)
  • Levels 15â€“25 â†’ Medium words (mediumLevelWords)
  • Levels 26+ â†’ Easy words (lowLevelWords)</li
See Also:
  • IWords
  • GameController

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Words()
    Constructor that initializes the three word lists with their predefined content for each difficulty level.

  • Constructor Details

    • Words

      public Words()
      Constructor that initializes the three word lists with their predefined content for each difficulty level.

  • Method Details

    • getLowLevelWords

      public ArrayList<String> getLowLevelWords()
      Returns the list of low difficulty words.
      Returns:
      ArrayList with the easy words.

    • getMediumLevelWords

      public ArrayList<String> getMediumLevelWords()
      Returns the list of medium difficulty words.
      Returns:
      ArrayList with the medium difficulty words.

    • getHardLevelWords

      public ArrayList<String> getHardLevelWords()
      Returns the list of high difficulty words.
      Returns:
      ArrayList with the difficult words.

    • generateWord

      public String generateWord(ArrayList<String> words)
      Selects and returns a random word from the provided list.
      Specified by:
      generateWord in interface IWords
      Parameters:
      words - List of words from which to choose randomly.
      Returns:
      A randomly chosen word.

    • validateWord

      public Boolean validateWord(String word, ArrayList<String> words)
      Verifies if the entered word exists in the given list.
      Specified by:
      validateWord in interface IWords
      Parameters:
      word - The word written by the player.
      words - The list of valid words for the current level.
      Returns:
      true if the word is in the list, false otherwise.

    • choiceArrayByLevel

      public ArrayList<String> choiceArrayByLevel(int level)
      Selects and returns the list of words corresponding to the given level.

      The selection logic is inverse to the expected difficulty: the first levels use difficult words and the last levels use easy words, which increases the pressure at the beginning of the match.

      Parameters:
      level - The current player level.
      Returns:
      The word list assigned to the level range: hard (1â€“14), medium (15â€“25) or easy (26+).

    • removeWord

      public void removeWord(String word, ArrayList<String> words)
      Removes the indicated word from the given list after being used correctly.

      This prevents the same word from appearing twice in the same match.

      Parameters:
      word - The word to remove.
      words - The list from which the word will be removed.
